penalties.description: The marked circle was not fully cut out and freed from the gauze material.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on timing (111 seconds) and detected an incomplete circle penalty. However, they disagreed on penalty severity - Claude applied the automatic zero rule while GPT applied a 25-point deduction. Per the rubric, incomplete_circle penalties result in automatic task failure and zero score when the circle is not freed from the material.

disagreements.rationale: The incomplete_circle penalty category requires automatic task failure when the circle is not completely freed from the gauze material, resulting in zero score regardless of time performance.
